configurableProperties.name: enabled
configurableProperties.description: Enable or disable visual revamps applied to code editor tabs.
configurableProperties.markdownDescription: Enable or disable visual revamps applied to code editor tabs.

configurableProperties.name: tabSeparatorStyle
configurableProperties.description: The style of a separator border that appears between two open tabs.
configurableProperties.markdownDescription: The style of a separator border that appears between two open tabs.

configurableProperties.name: glowSize
configurableProperties.description: The size of a glow effect that appears on the text of a tab when it is active, in pixels.
configurableProperties.markdownDescription: The size of a glow effect that appears on the text of a tab when it is active, in **pixels**.
